playbook.intent: Audit deadline approaches; control evidence is current, gaps closed, auditor walkthrough scripted. Every required control has a tagged artifact in the repo, every secret has a verified custodian, supply chain is provably scanned. Output: audit binder, internal walkthrough rehearsed, exceptions logged with remediation owner + date.
playbook.scope: Audit deadline approaches; control evidence is current, gaps closed, auditor walkthrough scripted. Every required control has a tagged artifact in the repo, every secret has a verified custodian, supply chain is provably scanned. Output: audit binder, internal walkthrough rehearsed, exceptions logged with remediation owner + date.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Define Scope
stage.intent: Which standard, which controls, which systems.

tasks.task: List the standard(s) in scope (SOC2 type, GDPR articles)
Identify the systems, vendors, and data flows in scope
Pick the auditor and the audit window

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when scope and auditor are signed off.

stage.name: Map Controls
stage.intent: What controls do we already have; what's missing.

tasks.task: Map current controls to the standard's requirements
Identify gaps and pick the owner per gap

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every gap has an owner and a target close date.

stage.name: Close Gaps

tasks.task: Implement controls per the gap list
Update policies, code, and vendor agreements as needed
Train the team on the new controls

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every gap is closed in writing.

stage.name: Collect Evidence
stage.intent: Auditors run on evidence, not adjectives.

tasks.task: Collect evidence per the plan (logs, screenshots, signed docs)
Run internal pre-audit against the evidence pack

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when pre-audit comes back clean.

stage.name: Audit & Remediate
stage.intent: Run the real audit; close findings.

tasks.task: Host the auditor through the audit window
Respond to findings within the agreed SLA
Get the report and the letter / certificate

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a clean (or remediated) audit letter.
